Title: Reset
Plot: A young college student and a game designer get trapped in a bizarre time loop after a deadly bus explosion and must work together to find the truth and stop the tragedy.

Title: The Spirealm
Plot: A virtual reality game developer discovers a mysterious doorway leading to a world of twelve deadly game levels where failing means dying in reality.

Title: Escape from the Trilateral
Plot: In a dystopian city controlled by an advanced AI tribunal, citizens are selected to enter a series of multi-dimensional escape rooms where survival depends on breaking physical laws.

Title: Animal World
Plot: A debt-ridden young man finds himself trapped aboard a mysterious cruise ship where he is forced to play a deadly, high-stakes game of rock-paper-scissors with international criminals.

Title: Missing Persons
Plot: After a bizarre car accident inside a mysterious valley, a group of survivors finds themselves trapped in a distorted time-space dimension where they must solve deadly puzzles to escape.

Title: Derailment
Plot: A wealthy young woman suddenly wakes up in a parallel universe where she is a penniless working-class girl, only to discover she is part of a massive virtual reality mind-control experiment.

Title: My Demon
Plot: A ruthless pitiless demon who temporarily loses his supernatural powers after his tattoo transfers to a cold chaotic heiress is forced to enter a contract marriage with her to protect his own survival.

Title: Death Game
Plot: A desperate man who insults Death is punished by being forced to experience life and death twelve times through different bodies, unless he can find a way to survive the impending doom.

Title: All Your Wishes Come True
Plot: An overly emotional genie trapped inside a magic lamp is awakened by a cold and emotionless woman who is granted three life-altering wishes.

Title: Hotel Del Luna
Plot: A mysterious hotel that caters exclusively to dead souls before they depart to the afterlife is managed by an ancient, cursed woman and an elite human hotelier.

Title: Descendants of the Sun
Plot: A captain of the South Korean Special Forces units falls in love with a beautiful cardiothoracic surgeon amid a war-torn country and natural disasters.

Title: The Infiltrator
Plot: A noble young woman in ancient China hides her true identity and infiltrates a powerful corrupt clan to seek justice for her family's tragic downfall.

Title: Goodbye My Princess
Plot: A beautiful and free-spirited princess from a Western kingdom falls into a devastating and tragic love affair with an ambitious crown prince who destroys her entire clan.

Title: Transformers
Plot: An ordinary teenager gets caught in the middle of a war between two factions of alien robotic lifeforms that can disguise themselves as everyday vehicles.

Title: Veil of Shadows
Plot: A young nine-tailed fox infiltrates a mysterious mansion to hunt a rogue demon and gets entangled in a series of heart-wrenching murder investigations and a battle between good and evil.

Title: A Quiet Place: Day One
Plot: A young woman finds herself trapped in New York City during the terrifying first day of an invasion by blind, hyper-sensitive alien creatures that hunt humans by sound.

Title: In Blossom
Plot: A brilliant female magistrate with a scarred face has her appearance magically swapped with a wealthy lady right before her wedding, forcing her to solve her own attempted murder case.

Title: Inside Out
Plot: A young girl struggles to adapt to her new life in a new city as her core personified emotions, Joy and Sadness, accidentally get lost inside the complex labyrinth of her mind.

Title: When Life Gives You Tangerines
Plot: Two people born on Jeju Island in the 1950s navigate their youth, dreams, and a deeply emotional romance across different seasons of their lives.

Title: Miracle in Cell No. 7
Plot: A mentally challenged father wrongfully imprisoned for murder builds friendships with his hardened cellmates, who secretly smuggle his young daughter into the prison.

Title: My Girl 2037
Plot: A nineteen-year-old girl who dreams of becoming a civil servant gets involved in an accidental murder and is sent to prison under inmate number 2037, where her cellmates protect her.

Title: Pawn
Plot: Two debt collectors take a nine-year-old girl as collateral from an illegal immigrant mother, but they unexpectedly end up becoming her loving adoptive fathers.

Title: Hope
Plot: After an eight-year-old girl suffers a brutal and horrific physical assault on her way to school, her family fights through immense emotional trauma to heal and rebuild their lives.

Title: Violet Evergarden: The Movie
Plot: A former child soldier working as an Auto Memory Doll writes letters for clients to understand the true meaning of the final words spoken by her beloved mentor.

Title: As Long as We Both Shall Live
Plot: A young noblewoman raised by an abusive family is married off to a notoriously cold and ruthless military commander, only to discover a warm and magical bond between them.

Title: Call Me Chihiro
Plot: A cheerful and unapologetic former sex worker starts a new job at a small bento shop in a seaside town, bringing comfort and healing to the lonely souls she encounters.

Title: Rurouni Kenshin: The Beginning
Plot: A legendary and ruthless assassin known as the Hitokiri Battosai uncovers the tragic story behind his iconic scar and his fateful encounters during the end of the Shogunate.

Title: Fangs of Fortune
Plot: During the Zhenlan era, a powerful demon leader who desires to die surrenders to the imperial court and joins a specialized task force to solve bizarre mythical murders and restore balance.

Title: Lovely Runner
Plot: A devoted fan travels back in time to her high school years to save her favorite top star from a tragic fate, altering their destinies and unraveling a deep connection across timelines.

Title: Your Name
Plot: Two strangers find themselves linked in a bizarre way when they suddenly switch bodies, but the connection becomes even more complicated when they decide to meet in person.

Title: Exhuma
Plot: A wealthy family in Los Angeles experiences a series of paranormal events and summons a pair of young, rising shamans to save their newborn baby, unraveling a dark ancestral grave secret.

Title: Mufasa: The Lion King
Plot: An orphaned lion cub named Mufasa is introduced to a sympathetic royal family, setting off an epic journey with a young prince to fulfill a grand destiny in the Pride Lands.

Title: Squid Game: Season 2
Plot: Three years after winning Squid Game, Player 456 remains determined to find the people behind the deadly tournament and put an end to their cruel game.

Title: Queen of Tears
Plot: The queen of department stores and her small-town husband weather a marital crisis and discover a miraculous new beginning to their love story.

Title: The Last Wife
Plot: During the Nguyen Dynasty, the beautiful third wife of a wealthy local governor risks her life and social status when she accidentally reunites with her passionate childhood love.

Title: Mai
Plot: A resilient nearly-forty massager with a chaotic family background tries to overcome her deep psychological traumas after falling in love with a charming younger musician.

Title: The House of No Man
Cast: Le Giang, Uyen An, Song Luan
Plot: The story revolves around the multi-generational family of Mrs. Nu, a strict crab noodle soup vendor who tightly controls the lives of her daughters, leading to deep emotional conflicts when her youngest daughter decides to rebel for love.

Title: Love in the Clouds
Plot: In a mythical realm, a cold-hearted female general pretending to be weak and a cunning, ruthless prince who hides behind a playful playboy persona cross paths in a dangerous political game, falling in love while investigating a dark martial arts conspiracy.
